coreJobStatement: Manufacture and deliver qualified precision metal components that meet OEM dimensional, material, and performance specifications for integration into vehicle body, closure, seat, and drivetrain programs [SRC: VN_automotive_components]
productJobStatement: Help Incoming Material Qualification to receive and release near-net-shape steel profile sections that meet OEM dimensional, material-grade, and surface hardness specifications — without requiring primary forming at Tier 1 — across the full program life
anchorLevel: L5 (standalone semi-finished product delivered to Tier 1 incoming dock)
lPath: L7 Automotive Component Manufacturing Ecosystem > L6a Incoming Material Qualification > L5 Precision Steel Profile Stock

segments.name: High-volume seat system Tier 1
segments.characteristics: Continuous JIT production; mandatory IATF 16949 third-party audit; OEM-directed program changes without lead time
segments.targetabilityReason: OEM program dictates profile geometry and approval protocol
segments.circumstance: Continuous JIT production; mandatory IATF 16949 third-party audit; OEM-directed program changes without lead time
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — OEM program dictates profile geometry and approval protocol

segments.name: Body / closure stamping Tier 1
segments.characteristics: High geometric mix per platform; structural crash performance requirements; corrosion protection mandatory
segments.targetabilityReason: Crush/crash specs add material certification requirements
segments.circumstance: High geometric mix per platform; structural crash performance requirements; corrosion protection mandatory
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — crush/crash specs add material certification requirements

segments.name: Drivetrain precision machining specialist
segments.characteristics: Highest tolerance class (IT6-IT8); multi-platform shaft programs; surface hardness on journal diameters
segments.targetabilityReason: Tightest dimensional and material traceability burden
segments.circumstance: Highest tolerance class (IT6-IT8); multi-platform shaft programs; surface hardness on journal diameters
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — tightest dimensional and material traceability burden

segments.name: Tier 2 contract machining house
segments.characteristics: Converts profile stock to finished parts for Tier 1; sources material independently; lower PPAP depth
segments.targetabilityReason: PPAP level often Level 1-2; price sensitivity higher
segments.circumstance: Converts profile stock to finished parts for Tier 1; sources material independently; lower PPAP depth
segments.alternativesDiffer: Yes — PPAP level often Level 1-2; price sensitivity higher

alternatives.name: Near-net-shape precision cold-drawn / cold-rolled profile stock
alternatives.tradeoffs: Custom tooling lead 6-12 weeks; min 100 kg economic batch; 2D constant cross-section only; die ownership complication at program end; higher unit cost vs. bar stock

alternatives.name: Standard round / flat bar stock machined to near-net at Tier 1
alternatives.tradeoffs: 40-80% material waste at Tier 1; machining cycle time consumes Tier 1 CNC capacity; no integrated surface hardness; no near-net geometry benefit

alternatives.name: Cold roll-formed structural open section (non-precision)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Tolerance class +-0.5 mm (inadequate for IT8 bearing surfaces); limited cross-section complexity; no in-line induction hardening; suitable only for structural OT3

alternatives.name: Hot-forged blank with post-machining
alternatives.tradeoffs: Higher per-unit cost; forging batch minimum >500 units; longer die-change cycle; different supply chain entirely; only viable for 3D-varying geometry

alternatives.name: Do nothing — continue machining from bar stock (status quo)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero P1 burden; 40-80% machining waste embedded in Tier 1 unit cost; no new qualification; no tooling investment

jobSteps.description: Specify profile geometry, IT tolerance class, material grade, surface hardness, and certification requirements per OEM drawing
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Profile geometry and grade spec are the primary inputs ZOLLERN needs to produce and certify the part
jobSteps.rawStatement: Specify profile geometry, IT tolerance class, material grade, surface hardness, and certification requirements per OEM drawing
jobSteps.rationale: Profile geometry and grade specification are the primary inputs ZOLLERN needs to produce and certify the part

jobSteps.description: Identify and pre-qualify a precision steel profile supplier capable of producing the specified cross-section geometry at required volume
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: ZOLLERN is discovered and evaluated at this step; supplier capability is assessed here
jobSteps.rawStatement: Identify and pre-qualify a precision steel profile supplier capable of producing the specified cross-section geometry at required volume
jobSteps.rationale: ZOLLERN is discovered and evaluated at this step; supplier capability (Cpk, IATF cert) is assessed here

jobSteps.description: Execute PPAP qualification: die trial, first-article dimensional inspection, SPC study, EN 10204 3.1 certification
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: ZOLLERN's 6-12 week tooling lead time and PPAP readiness directly determine timeline
jobSteps.rawStatement: Execute PPAP qualification: die trial, first-article dimensional inspection, SPC study, EN 10204 3.1 certification
jobSteps.rationale: ZOLLERN's 6-12 week tooling lead time and PPAP documentation capability directly determine program launch timeline

jobSteps.description: Verify each profile delivery against OEM drawing dimensions and material certification before releasing to production
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: Incoming inspection of ZOLLERN profiles — IT8 tolerance requires CMM or dedicated gauging
jobSteps.rawStatement: Verify each profile delivery against OEM drawing dimensions and material certification before releasing to production
jobSteps.rationale: Incoming inspection of ZOLLERN profiles requires CMM or dedicated gauging for IT8 tolerance class

jobSteps.description: Release certified profile stock to Tier 1 forming / machining operations on JIT call-off schedule
jobSteps.rawStatement: Release certified profile stock to Tier 1 forming and machining operations on JIT call-off schedule
jobSteps.rationale: Delivery logistics and call-off execution; relevant but ZOLLERN's precision differentiates less here

jobSteps.description: Track ongoing SPC data, surface hardness, and delivery performance across the program production life
jobSteps.sensorDependencyRationale: ZOLLERN's SPC output feeds Tier 1's control charts; dimensional drift creates downstream rework
jobSteps.rawStatement: Track ongoing SPC data, surface hardness, and delivery performance across the program production life
jobSteps.rationale: ZOLLERN's SPC output feeds Tier 1 control charts; dimensional drift in delivered profiles creates downstream rework
